answers.label: Building physical things — structures, machines, systems
Analytical — I like logic, data, and figuring out how things work

milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in financial analyst to build a strong learning foundation

resources.title: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
Financial Modeling Specialization (Wharton, University of Pennsylvania) on Coursera
Investment Management Specialization (University of Geneva) on Coursera
Python for Financial Analysis and Algorithmic Trading on Udemy

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in financial modelling and forecasting, financial statement analysis, and valuation techniques (dcf, comparables) — these are the essential building blocks for a financial analyst

resources.title: financial analyst — Core Skill Learning courses on Coursera
financial analyst — Core Skill Learning courses on Udemy
financial analyst — Core Skill Learning tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in data analysis (excel, python), investment research, and budget analysis, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: financial analyst — Intermediate / Advanced Skills courses on Coursera
financial analyst — Intermediate / Advanced Skills courses on Udemy
financial analyst — Intermediate / Advanced Skills tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing data analysis projects, research studies, or analytical reports using real-world datasets — focus on applying financial modelling and forecasting, and financial statement analysis in realistic scenarios

resources.title: financial analyst — Hands-on Practice courses on Coursera
financial analyst — Hands-on Practice courses on Udemy
financial analyst — Hands-on Practice tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a portfolio of analytical projects: publish notebooks on Kaggle or GitHub, create data visualizations, and document your methodology and findings

resources.title: financial analyst — Portfolio Building courses on Coursera
financial analyst — Portfolio Building courses on Udemy
financial analyst — Portfolio Building tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your financial analyst skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: financial analyst — CV / Profile Building courses on Coursera
financial analyst — CV / Profile Building courses on Udemy
financial analyst — CV / Profile Building tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Job Application / Freelancing
milestones.description: Apply for financial analyst positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews

resources.title: financial analyst jobs on Wuzzuf
financial analyst jobs on Forasna
